subcodes.title: Khoekhoegowab: Gagasi-/Awemas
subcodes.first_line:
## Khoekhoegowab: Gagasi-/Awemas

(/Awemas di oms !nadu ga ≠ga //aib hoab ai, ne /goresa /gorere ≠gaob Eloba /ami xa ra
subcodes.notes: Theory: Khoekhoegowab morning/instruction prayer (section Gagasi-/Awemas) with instruction text in parentheses. Contains instruction about morning prayer usage. Similar structure to other morning prayer entries. Challenge: Khoisan click consonants; instruction text embedded.
